J JSME
Features Playground Help GitHub
Distribution · Documentation

JSME documentation & examples

Implementation notes, the full API reference, integration examples, and test pages for the JSME molecule editor distribution.

Start here

Getting started

Read the implementation guide first, then try the minimal example or the API playground.

doc.html Basic information about embedding JSME into a web page.
Implementation guide
 JSME_minimal.html Minimalistic example showing how to incorporate JSME into a web page.
Minimal embed
 JSME_test.html Interactive playground covering rendering options, callbacks, and import/export.
Playground
Reference

API documentation

The JSME API documentation is generated automatically and follows Java conventions — sufficient to call all low-level JSME functions.

api_javadoc/index.html Full Javadoc-style reference for the JSME JavaScript API.
API reference
 jsme/ The actual JSME runtime — JavaScript bundles optimized per browser. Load jsme/jsme.nocache.js in your page.
Runtime files
Examples

Basic integration

Drop-in patterns: migrating from the JME Java applet, controlling size, and embedding in special containers.

JME_to_JSME_simple.html Adapt a page that used the JME Java applet to JSME (simple form). JME_to_JSME.html Full migration example from the JME Java applet to JSME. JSME_resize.html Resize the applet programmatically. JSME_autoresize.html Automatically resize the applet when the window size changes. JSME_hidden.html JSME embedded inside a hidden <div>. JSME_dojo.html Dynamically load JSME alongside another dynamic loading library.
Examples

Depict & SVG

Read-only display modes, depict/edit toggles, and SVG generation.

JSME_depict_smiles.html JSME in depict mode, initialized with a SMILES string. JSME_depict_edit_toggle.html Toggle between depict and edit mode. JSME_depict_action.html Depict mode with action enabled dynamically. JSME_depict.html Basic depict mode example. JSME_depict_with_callbacks.html Depict mode wired up with JavaScript callbacks. JSME_SVG.html Generate SVG output of the current molecule. JSME_editor_plus_SVG.html Editor side-by-side with live SVG output. JSME_smiles_atom_highlight.html Display SMILES with selected atoms highlighted.
Examples

Interaction & callbacks

Drag & drop, structure-modification callbacks, atom highlighting, and the chemical resolver.

JSME_dnd_demo.html Drag & drop capabilities for files and structures. JSME_callback_and_mark.html JavaScript callback for structure modification, plus atom marking. JSME_atom_highlight_demo.html Highlight atoms inside the editor. JSME_chemical_resolver_demo.html Communicate with the NIH Chemical Identifier Resolver to retrieve pasted names. JSME_access_internal_data.html Access the chemical data of structures and reactions inside the editor. JSME_additional_data.html Save custom data into atoms and bonds; custom background coloring. JSME_custom_x_shortcuts.html Create custom keyboard shortcuts for the editor. JSME_functional_group_coloring.html Create a custom background color palette for atoms. JSME_alternative_look.html Customize the JSME look and feel.
Examples

Templates, R-groups & InChI

Build custom templates, work with R-groups, and use the bundled InChI library.

JSME_Rgroups.html Handling of R groups. JSME_template.html Creation of custom templates. JSME_template_aminoacids.html Peptide builder built from amino-acid templates. JSME_template_cysteine_lesson.html Worked cysteine example using templates. JSME_parent_and_metabolites.html Setup for metabolite generation using custom templates. JSME_inchi_direct.html Use the provided InChI library directly. JSME_inchi_direct_interactive.html Interactive example of the bundled InChI library. JSME_test_api.html Test JSApplet.JSME.replaceAllAppletsByJSME.
Internal

Test pages

Pages used by the developers to check JSME's behavior and performance under load.

test_bootstrap.html Check compatibility with Bootstrap CSS. bootstrap.html JSME inside a Bootstrap layout. test_depict_many.html Display 200 identical structures in JSME format. test_depict_many_smiles.html Display 200 structures in SMILES format. test_depict_one_smiles_in_table.html One SMILES structure inside a dynamically created table. test_depict_many_smiles_in_table.html 100 SMILES structures inside a dynamically created table. test_pubchem_aspirin_depict.html 121 structures in MOL format inside a dynamically created table. test_depict_patent_reactions_smirks.html 200 chemical reactions in SMIRKS format. test_depict_fragments.html Depict fragments / partial structures. test_resize_and_replace_jme.html Dynamic resizing combined with replaceAllAppletsByJSME. test_hidden_iframe.html Show and hide JSME embedded in an iframe.
Reference

Other files

License and release information for this distribution.

license.txt Full text of the BSD license under which JSME is distributed. release_notes.txt JSME changelog and release notes.
Cite JSME

B. Bienfait and P. Ertl, JSME: a free molecule editor in JavaScript, Journal of Cheminformatics 5:24 (2013).

JSME

A free molecule editor in JavaScript by Peter Ertl and Bruno Bienfait.

Released under the BSD license.
